title: Italian Options Babies Breath 2.5cm Small Artificial Pearl Flowers Royal Blue (72 Pack)
features: 2.5cm diameter fabric flowers beautifully crafted from satin and organza material

10cm wired stem wrapped in white paper florist tape
Perfect bouquet filler, cake decoration, card making accessory or scrapbooking embellishment
